title: containers-common bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[5:0.64.0-4.0.1]
- Update additional upstream references [Orabug: 37843297]
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[5:0.64.0-4]
- update vendored components for 10.1
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.1-3]
- remove the ugly installation hack in tests
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.1-2]
- update shortnames from Pyxis
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.0-1]
- update vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.62.0-2]
- fetch TMT podman revdep tests from podman dist-git
- needs at least podman 5.4.0-7.el10
- Related: RHEL-80817
full_text:
[5:0.64.0-4.0.1]
- Update additional upstream references [Orabug: 37843297]
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[5:0.64.0-4]
- update vendored components for 10.1
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.1-3]
- remove the ugly installation hack in tests
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.1-2]
- update shortnames from Pyxis
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.63.0-1]
- update vendored components
- Related: RHEL-80817

[5:0.62.0-2]
- fetch TMT podman revdep tests from podman dist-git
- needs at least podman 5.4.0-7.el10
- Related: RHEL-80817

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20410-0.html
